polymarket_summary.summary:

Data: Ethereum dip to $1,250 by Dec 31 2026: Yes 24% (vol $191,761). Bitcoin reach $72,500 in July: Yes 7% (vol $110,508). Bitcoin reach $67,500 in July: Yes 56% (vol $93,487). Bitcoin dip to $57,500 in July: Yes 4% (vol $91,220).

Interpretation: For Bitcoin, higher probability of reaching $67.5k (56%) vs $72.5k (7%) and dip to $57.5k (4%). So moderate bullish sentiment for $67.5k, low for higher target, low dip probability. Ethereum dip to $1.25k by end 2026 only 24% chance, implying low bearish expectation long term. Overall sentiment: Mixed but leaning bullish for Bitcoin near-term, bearish for Ethereum long term? Actually Ethereum dip probability low => not expecting dip => bullish for Ethereum
